title: platystyliparis decurrens
intro: Platystyliparis decurrens, also known as the curved-lipped platystyliparis, is a type of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Japan. This plant has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platystyliparis decurrens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
